commits.message:
FFS-3841: Add header, exit, and back to Community Service flow (#1449)

Creates a component for the Activity Header, complete with Exit, Back, and Exit Warning modal.
Exposes ways for activity flows to interact with these buttons.
Implements the header on the Community Service flow.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message: FFS-3816: Education self-attestation: doc upload (#1448)

commits.message:
No ticket: Add Emmy Income to demo launcher (#1446)

Now, you can select whether you want to launch Emmy Income (fka CBV) or Emmy CE (fka just Emmy) from the demo launcher.
The demo launcher also now loads all the relevant agencies and will use the one you select when kicking off a flow.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
Fix progress indicator bar on Webkit browsers (#1444)

The progress indicator used `attr()` to dynamically set the width of the
`::before` pseudo-element in order to fill up the progress bar. This
turns out to be a bit too fancy for Safari and [a lot of other
browsers][1].

This commit replaces the pseudo-element with a standard `<div>` that
gets a width assigned the old-fashioned way, via inline styling.

[1]: https://caniuse.com/css3-attr
commits.author: Tom Dooner

commits.message:
FFS-3824: two column activity hub layout (#1441)

commits.message:
Remove AZ DES Configuration and Customizations (#1420)

We had built the following customizations for AZ DES, which are also
removed:
* SFTP filename and daily reporting functionality
* Name matching (versus a JSON object of income changes on the case)
* Customized weekly report fields
commits.author: Tom Dooner
